/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -O3  -DOPENFHE_VERSION=1.2.3 -Wno-parentheses -DMATHBACKEND=4 -fopenmp CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/utils/globals.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/utils/helper.cpp.o -o test   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -fopenmp libencryption.a libcnn.a /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEpke.so.1.2.3 /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEbinfhe.so.1.2.3 /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEcore.so.1.2.3 -ldl -fopenmp
